title: Build Clash of Clans-style strategy game with base-building, resource management, and combat

requirements.text: Create a 3D isometric game world using Three.js with React Three Fiber where players can view and interact with their base from a top-down perspective
acceptanceCriteria: 3D scene renders with isometric camera view
Players can pan and zoom the camera to view their base
Grid-based terrain is visible for building placement

requirements.text: Implement a resource management system tracking Gold and Elixir with visual counters in the UI header
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores Gold and Elixir amounts per player
Resources increment over time from resource buildings
UI displays current resource amounts with icons
Resource amounts update in real-time

requirements.text: Create a building placement system allowing players to place, move, and upgrade buildings on a grid-based map
acceptanceCriteria: Players can select buildings from a build menu
Buildings snap to grid positions during placement
Placement validates available space and resource costs
Buildings can be moved by dragging after placement
Backend persists building positions and levels

requirements.text: Implement core building types: Town Hall, Gold Mine, Elixir Collector, Gold Storage, Elixir Storage, Barracks, and defensive structures (Cannon, Archer Tower, Walls)
acceptanceCriteria: Each building type has distinct 3D model representation
Buildings have level-specific stats (HP, production rate, capacity)
Resource buildings generate resources over time
Storage buildings have capacity limits
Defensive buildings have range and damage properties
Backend stores building type, level, and stats

requirements.text: Create a building upgrade system with time-based construction and resource costs
acceptanceCriteria: Players can upgrade buildings by spending resources
Upgrades take time to complete (tracked by backend)
Visual indicator shows buildings under construction
Only one upgrade can be active at a time per builder
Completed upgrades improve building stats and appearance

requirements.text: Implement a troop training system in Barracks allowing players to queue and train different unit types (Barbarian, Archer, Giant)
acceptanceCriteria: Players can select troops to train from Barracks menu
Training consumes Elixir and takes time
Training queue shows progress and remaining time
Trained troops are added to army camp capacity
Backend tracks trained troop counts per player

requirements.text: Create an attack mode where players can deploy troops on an enemy base and watch them autonomously attack buildings and defenses
acceptanceCriteria: Players can enter attack mode with their trained troops
Troops can be deployed by clicking/tapping on the map
Troops pathfind to nearest targets and attack autonomously
Defensive buildings target and damage attacking troops
Buildings are destroyed when HP reaches zero
Combat calculations happen in backend for validation

requirements.text: Implement combat mechanics with troop stats (HP, damage, movement speed, attack range) and targeting logic
acceptanceCriteria: Each troop type has defined stats
Troops target nearest buildings or defenses
Damage is calculated per attack tick
Troops are removed when HP reaches zero
Attack results determine resource rewards

requirements.text: Create a matchmaking system that pairs players with similar-level bases for attacking
acceptanceCriteria: Players can search for opponents to attack
Matchmaking considers Town Hall level
Players can skip and search for a different base
Backend provides enemy base layout for attack

requirements.text: Implement a reward system for successful attacks that awards Gold and Elixir based on destruction percentage
acceptanceCriteria: Track percentage of enemy base destroyed
Calculate resource rewards based on destruction
Award resources to attacker after battle ends
Deduct stolen resources from defender's storage
Show battle results summary with stars earned (0-3)

requirements.text: Design a visually cohesive fantasy medieval game theme with vibrant colors, stone and wood textures for buildings, and grass terrain, creating an engaging strategy game aesthetic
acceptanceCriteria: UI uses fantasy-themed colors and typography
Buildings have medieval fantasy aesthetic
Consistent visual style across all game elements
Terrain textures match the fantasy theme

requirements.text: Render generated game assets including building icons, troop portraits, and resource icons as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are referenced correctly in components
All required icons and graphics are displayed in the UI

constraints: Use Three.js with React Three Fiber for all 3D rendering
All game state and combat calculations must be handled in the Motoko backend
Single-actor architecture must be maintained in backend/main.mo
Real-time updates must use React Query for data fetching
nonGoals: Multiplayer real-time battles with simultaneous players
Social features like friend invites or leaderboards

required: Gold coin icon with shiny metallic appearance (gold-icon.dim_64x64.png)
Purple elixir droplet icon with glossy effect (elixir-icon.dim_64x64.png)
Medieval town hall building illustration with stone walls and red roof (townhall-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Gold mine building with pickaxe and ore cart (goldmine-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Purple elixir collector building with magical crystal (elixir-collector-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Wooden barracks building with training yard (barracks-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Wooden archer tower with archer on top (archer-tower-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Barbarian warrior portrait with helmet and sword (barbarian-portrait.dim_96x96.png)
Archer portrait with bow and arrows (archer-portrait.dim_96x96.png)
Construction hammer icon for building upgrades (construction-icon.dim_64x64.png)
Victory star icon for battle results (star-icon.dim_64x64.png)
